economic_notes: Kehewin Power Trust holds units in the Indigenous Communities Syndicate Limited Partnership, participating in the $1.5 billion Cascade Power Project (900MW natural gas plant near Edson, AB, expected completion 2023). AIOC provided $93 million in loan guarantees. Nation also has interests in oilfield services companies and a gasification entity.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Prior year (2021) figures are restated per Note 17. Revenue lines include deferred revenue movements making gross revenue appear different from cash receipts. OSR is negative because government transfers exceed total reported revenue after deferred revenue netting. Term loans due on demand of $6,018,115 plus long-term debt of $5,063,562 = total debt $11,081,677. Three trusts (Legacy, TLE, Specific Claims) are included in consolidation as unincorporated entities. Three business entities (681415 Alberta Ltd., Kwayaskwaw Contracting Ltd., Kehewin Power Trust) accounted for by modified equity method. No remuneration schedule included in the extracted text. Restricted cash includes capital projects ($4,237,480), CMHC ($264,911), and funds held in trust ($105,749).
